title: Creating a mirror column for emails
excerpt: The problem I am running into is that I can’t assign an email column that is in the board as a mirror (since we keep our client contact details separate from billing/onboarding). Is it possible to have a mirror column pu…

posts.author: anotherbradidea (Brad Sappenfield)
posts.cookedHtml: The problem I am running into is that I can’t assign an email column that is in the board as a mirror (since we keep our client contact details separate from billing/onboarding). Is it possible to have a mirror column pull in the email address?

posts.author: FuelDog (Kevin Gulley)
posts.cookedHtml: This is an enormous problem. You have to address this asap.
